title: alchemilla ellenbeckii subsp. granvikii
intro: Alchemilla ellenbeckii subsp. granvikii, also known as a subspecies of the alpine lady's mantle, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing swelling, promoting tissue repair, and providing antioxidant effects. Alchemilla ellenbeckii subsp. granvikii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and is often used in traditional medicine to support skin health and tissue recovery.
